content:
# Session 3 (iter-003) ‚Äî Review Summary

## Metadata
- 2 prover lanes, both `opus`, both `lake build` green, 0 axioms introduced.
- Sorry counts (per file, before ‚Üí after):
  - `FlatBaseChange.lean`: 3 ‚Üí 4 (+1 new crux; closed 1 new deliverable + 5 helpers sorry-free).
  - `SectionGradedRing.lean`: 3 ‚Üí 8 (closed 2 of 3 targets sorry-free; residual decomposed into 5 named coherence helpers).
  - `FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean`: 4 ‚Üí 4 (untouched this iter).
  - **Project total: 10 ‚Üí 16 raw.** Rise is decomposition + new scaffolding, NOT regression (2 SNAP targets became sorry-free, 1 new FBC deliverable closed).

## Lane 1 ‚Äî FBC, FlatBaseChange.lean (concrete per-chart layer)
### `baseChange_chart_tensorIso` (a) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean
- `(restrictScalars includeRight).mapIso (moduleSpecŒìFunctor.mapIso (pullback_spec_tilde_iso Œπ M) ‚â™‚â´ (tilde.toTildeŒìNatIso.app _).symm) ‚â™‚â´ base_change_mate_regroupEquiv œà œÜ M`.
- Two dead-ends logged: (1) `tilde.toTildeŒìNatIso.app` direction needs `.symm` (it reads `ùü≠ ‚Üí tilde`); (2) `TensorProduct.AlgebraTensorModule.cancelBaseChange` does NOT apply directly to `(R‚äó_AB)‚äó_RM ‚Üí B‚äó_AM` (forces `[Algebra A B]`, no `R‚ÜíB` map) ‚Äî must route through proved `base_change_mate_regroupEquiv` (`comm ‚â´ cancelBaseChange ‚â´ comm`). Reuse, not edit, of the mate-region deliverable.
- `lean_verify` axioms = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`, no `sorryAx`. fbc003 confirmed not transitively sorry-backed.

### `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_restriction_naturality` (b) ‚Äî PARTIAL (1 crux sorry, L1189)
- 5 scaffolding helpers all proved sorry-free: `chartRestrictionAlgHom`, `chartBaseChangeRingMap`, `chartBaseChange_ring_square` (b1, via `Algebra.TensorProduct.map_comp_includeLeft`), `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison` (`pullbackComp`√ó2 + `pullbackCongr`), `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc` (b2-alg, `extendScalarsComp`√ó2 + `eqToIso`).
- Residual after `apply Iso.ext`: naturality of the opaque `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` (built via `conjugateIsoEquiv` of `gammaPushforwardNatIso`) across the base-change ring square. `rfl` (not defeq), `aesop_cat` (reduces to bare hom-eq), `simp only [chart‚Ä¶]` (just unfolds geom comparison) all fail. Genuine b2 crux ‚Äî no Mathlib gap.

## Lane 2 ‚Äî SNAP, SectionGradedRing.lean (graded-ring coherences)
### Targets ‚Äî 2 of 3 fully wired (sorry-free bodies)
- `sectionsMul_mul_one` ‚úÖ, `sectionsMul_mul_comm` ‚úÖ ‚Äî both via the `sectionsMul_one_mul` template (`rw [gMul_def, tensorPowAdd_*, Iso.trans_hom]; show; sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel; section-core`). BUT each invokes a sorry-bearing `tensorPowAdd_*`, so transitively sorry-backed (docstrings don't note this ‚Äî minor, see audit).
- `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` ‚õî PARTIAL ‚Äî `simp only [gMul_def]` unfolds to explicit nested form (positional `rw [gMul_def a b, ‚Ä¶]` FAILS: "Did not find an occurrence of GMul.mul ?m ?b"). Residual needs `sectionsMul`-whiskering naturality bricks (not in file) + `tensorPowAdd_assoc` + `sectionMul_assoc_core`.

### New infra
- FULLY PROVED: `tensorObjRightUnitor` (`œÅ_G = Œª_G ‚àò Œ≤_{G,ùüô}`), `tensorObjRightUnitor_hom` (rfl), `sectionMul_braiding_core` (`Œì(Œ≤)(Œ∑(œÉ‚äóœÑ))=Œ∑(œÑ‚äóœÉ)` via unit-naturality), `sectionMul_rightUnitor_core`.
- Key dead-ends: `rw [‚Üê Hbraid]` on goal FAILS (TensorProduct instance mismatch: CommRing-base vs RingCat-base) ‚Äî use `Hel.symm.trans (congrArg _ Hbraid)`; `erw [ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.braiding_hom_apply]` raises spurious `CommRing ringCatSheaf` synth failure ‚Äî braiding-on-tmul is `rfl` after `rw [happ]`.

### Named blocker (5 sorry-bearing decls)
All reduce to ONE thing: **Mac Lane symmetric-monoidal coherence (triangle/hexagon/pentagon) transferred from `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory` to `X.Modules` through the `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` comparison isos baked into `tensorObjAssoc`** (a 5-segment composite). Needs a sheaf-level monoidal coherence API that does not yet exist in file (multi-hundred LOC). The `tensorPowAdd_rightUnit` base case is further gated on `tensorBraiding ùüô ùüô = Iso.refl` ‚Äî Mathlib name not found (`BraidedCategory.braiding_tensorUnit_left` does NOT exist; leansearch/loogle HTTP500 this session). No LLM API key in env (informal agent unavailable).

## Review subagent findings (reports in task_results/, archived in logs/iter-003/)
- **lean-auditor audit003**: SOUND. 0 must-fix, 2 major, 5 minor, 0 excuse-comments. All 16 sorry sites carry honest route comments.
- **lean-vs-blueprint fbc003**: faithful, 0 deceptive red flags. 2 major (5 chart helpers have no blueprint block; b2 proof-sketch under-specified) + 1 minor (dangling `\lean{}` ref, see below).
- **lean-vs-blueprint snap003**: faithful, 0 red flags, 2 minor (coverage of `tensorObjRightUnitor_hom`; transitive-sorry caveat).

### IMPORTANT ‚Äî auditor's "viable route" read on `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose`
audit003 (no-strategic-bias by design) calls this sorry a "viable conjugate-counit route", NOT a dead end, and disputes the "DEAD end" label. This is a **local-Lean** judgment. Strategically it is OFF the goal-closure cone (iter-002 leandag: goal closure = 22 nodes, ZERO mate riders; concrete-tilde chain replaces it). Archon memory: MATE route is DEAD. **Do NOT let the auditor's local read revive the mate route** ‚Äî it stays a fenced-off rider.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:pushforward_base_change_mate_sections_direct`: added `% NOTE:` ‚Äî its `\lean{}` target `AlgebraicGeometry.pushforward_base_change_mate_sections_direct` does NOT exist in Lean (abandoned MATE `_sections_direct` route, DEAD per memory, off the goal-closure cone). Warns the planner not to dispatch here. (blueprint-doctor missed it: it checks `\ref`/`\uses` label resolution, not `\lean{}` target existence; the label itself resolves.)
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync_leanok ran iter-003, sha 67db6ca, +19/-0; its verdicts match my first-hand reading).
- No `\lean{}` renames (provers used planned names). No `\mathlibok` (new helpers are project-proved, not Mathlib re-exports). No stale `\notready` found.

## Notes (LOW)
- `set_option maxHeartbeats N in` before `/-! -/` doc blocks in FlatBaseChange.lean (L1205, 1240‚Äì1243) are no-ops (consumed by the doc command, don't reach the theorem). Cosmetic.
- Stale iter-progress narrative (STATUS iter-234/236) in FlatBaseChange.lean L184‚Äì247 ‚Äî accurate but dead history; could be trimmed.
